2026-05-31T09:15:45.1255734Z [36;1m# Create a temporary file[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.1256023Z [36;1mtouch /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.1256292Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.1256559Z [36;1m# Add the opening of the asciiart definition[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.1257167Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciiart =' > /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.1257534Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.1257765Z [36;1m# Decode base64 ASCII art to a file[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.2906692Z [36;1mecho "" | base64 -d > /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4665629Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4666034Z [36;1m# Process each line of the input ASCII art and format it properly[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4666491Z [36;1mwhile IFS= read -r line; do[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4666879Z [36;1m  # Escape backslashes[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4667244Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$line" | sed 's/\\/\\\\/g')[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4667614Z [36;1m  # Escape any double quotes[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4667984Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$escaped_line" | sed 's/"/\\"/g')[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4668406Z [36;1m  # Add the line with proper C string formatting[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4668811Z [36;1m  echo '"'"$escaped_line"'\n"' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4669170Z [36;1mdone < /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4669452Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4669685Z [36;1m# Add the closing part with VERSION[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4670209Z [36;1mecho '"             Free60.org XeLL - Xenon Linux Loader " VERSION "\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4670882Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4671175Z [36;1m# Add the asciitail part[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4671673Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciitail =' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4672501Z [36;1mecho '"    Special Corona & Winchester Compatible XeLL version\n\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4673221Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4673555Z [36;1m# Ensure CP437 encoding[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4674516Z [36;1miconv -f UTF-8 -t CP437 /tmp/new_asciiart.h > /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h || cp /tmp/new_asciiart.h /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4675446Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4675690Z [36;1m# Replace the original file[0m
2026-05-31T09:15:45.4676141Z [36;1mcp /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h source/lv2/asciiart.h[0m
